title: Refined Netherite
body:
Better than netherite. Refined Netherite is better than netherite and adding it to your armor makes it stronger and better, this mod even adds a new item called the wooden bat and its varients the Iron bat and Refined Netherite Bat.

Use for decoration.

![use for decoration](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c4e74544ee96fbbe2a5cd66b6c728065dd32ac60.png)

New items after installing the mod.

![new items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b08ae744cef1c8e97bb3007881b52335c75df6e2.png)
